channel.title: Blue Ridge Boost — Hands-on STEM learning (Ages 6+) in Charlottesville
channel.description: Recent content on Blue Ridge Boost — Hands-on STEM learning (Ages 6+) in Charlottesville

item.title: Code Craft: Minecraft Coding | Blue Ridge Boost
Brick Bots & Code Blocks | Blue Ridge Boost
Code Craft: Minecraft Coding | Blue Ridge Boost
Build, Code, Explore | Blue Ridge Boost
Code Craft: Minecraft Coding | Blue Ridge Boost
CodeHS Computer Coding with C++ | Blue Ridge Boost
Happy New Year!
item.description:
Table Of Contents
  1. Heading 2
    1. Heading 3
      1. Heading 4
        1. Heading 5
        2. Emphasis
        3. Link
        4. Paragraph
        5. Ordered List
        6. Unordered List
        7. Code and Syntax Highlighting
        8. Blockquote
        9. Inline HTML
        10. Tables
        11. Image
        12. Youtube video

Here is example of hedings. You can use this heading by following markdownify rules. For example: use # for heading 1 and use ###### for heading 6.

Heading 1

Heading 2

Heading 3

Heading 4

Heading 5
Heading 6
Emphasis

Emphasis, aka italics, with asterisks or underscores.

item.title: 1-Day Camps | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Save 25% — register 3+ days before camp Missing a school day? Let us know

1-Day Camps

Hands-on STEM programs during school breaks, snow days, and teacher workdays for ages 6–13. Half-day (8:30 AM–1:00 PM) and full-day (8:30 AM–5:00 PM) options — all materials included.

Topics

Robotics — build and program robots
Coding & Game Design — Minecraft Education and Roblox Studio
Strategic Games — board games and logic puzzles

item.title: Advanced STEM Camps | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Advanced STEM Camps · Ages 13+

Week-long, project-based camps for teens ready to go deeper. Advanced 11 and 12-year-olds are welcome. Full-day ($599.99) and half-day ($399.99) — all materials included.

Schedule

Full-day: 8:30 AM–5:30 PM
Half-day AM: 8:30 AM–1:00 PM
Half-day PM: 12:30–5:00 PM
Ratio: 8:1 camper-to-staff

Logistics

Location: 2171 Ivy Rd, Charlottesville
Ages: 13+ (advanced 11–12 welcome)
Includes: All materials & computers
Bring: Snack (half-day) · 2 snacks + lunch (full-day)

item.title: Artificial Intelligence Classes | Blue Ridge Boost
Camps | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Summer: 15% off until April 1 10% off for subscribers (combinable)

Ages 6–12

Hands-on STEM camps in robotics, coding, game design, math, and more. All materials and computer use included.

Summer Camps

Week-long camps with full-day ($599.99) and half-day ($399.99) options. Robotics, coding, game design, math, science, and strategic games.

Explore Summer Camps

Spring Break Camps

A week of hands-on STEM fun during spring break. Half-day and full-day options available.

item.title: Celebrations | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
At Blue Ridge Boost, we turn your child's birthday into a tech-powered adventure with robotics and gaming fun!

Party Details

Max 15 Guests + 1 Birthday Kid

2 hours of tech-empowered birthday fun!

Find Their Perfect Birthday Theme

Gaming Themes

Minecraft
Rec. Ages: 6+
Roblox
Rec. Ages: 8+
Fortnite
Rec. Ages: 10+
Call of Duty
Rec. Ages: 12+
Valorant
Rec. Ages: 12+
Other Games
Upon Request

Robotics Themes

Lego Robotics
Rec. Ages: 6+
Sphero Bots
Rec. Ages: 6+
Lego Battle Bots
Rec. Ages: 6+
Sumo Bots
Rec. Ages: 8+
VexIQ Battle Bots
Rec. Ages: 10+
Aerial Drones
Rec. Ages: 10+

Combo (+99.99)

Your Choice of Gaming Theme

item.title: Certification Bootcamps | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
15% off until April 1 10% off until May 31 10% off for subscribers (combinable)

Certification Bootcamps · Ages 13+

Earn an industry-recognized certification in a small-group, intensive program. All materials, computer use, and exam fees included. $1,299.99.

Robotics Academy

Cert: Carnegie Mellon Robotics Academy
Full-day: 1 week
Half-day: 2 weeks
Students may take home some projects; specialized robotics sets remain with Blue Ridge Boost.

item.title: Chess Club and Classes | Blue Ridge Boost
Coding and Robotics Certifications | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
About Our Classes and Certifications

Blue Ridge Boost is proud to offer classes and certifications in robotics and coding. All instructors hold a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and are certified by the Carnegie Mellon Robotics Academy. Both certifications are industry-recognized and approved by the Virginia Department of Education.
We offer separate classes for adults, as well as advanced middle school and high school students.

Please contact us to add classes to the schedule.

Coding Classes

Our coding classes follow the CodeHS curriculum. You can complete the course content on your own or join our classes for an engaging, in-person education. You may sign up for a week or a month (depending on the class) to prepare for the test and complete it in person at Blue Ridge Boost. The certificates for coding are issued by CodeHS.

item.title: Coding and Robotics Classes for Adults | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
These are classes for adults. Classes for children are available here.

Request a Class Not Offered

Is there a class you’d like to take but it’s not available? Let us know!
Email nora@blueridgeboost.com with the following details:

  • Topic: What subject or skill would you like to learn?
  • Level: Beginner, intermediate, or advanced?
  • Preferred Times: Let us know what days and times work best for you.

We look forward to hearing from you!

item.title: Coding and Robotics Classes on Sale | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Get $75 off 1-week camps and $250 off 2-week camps!

Limited-time offer – enroll now and save big!

item.title: Computer Coding Classes and Tutoring | Blue Ridge Boost
Drop-In Robotics | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Bring your young innovators to Blue Ridge Boost for a fun and creative Robotics Play Time! Perfect for kids ages 6 to 13, this drop-in session is held first Saturday of every month and offers hands-on exploration with robotics in a playful, low-pressure environment.

No prior experience is needed—just bring your imagination and curiosity!

  • Time: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM
  • Where: At Blue Ridge Boost - 2171 Ivy Rd, Charlottesville

Come drop in and watch your child’s creativity soar! 🚀

item.title: For You | Blue Ridge Boost"
item.description:
Group Classes, just for you! Our on‑demand Group Classes are designed to be flexible and tailored to your group—schedule between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM, or later, to fit your day.

Perfect for

  • Homeschool Groups
  • Education Pods
  • Series of Field Trips
  • Study Groups
If you have any questions, or are interested in bringing your group to Blue Ridge Boost, please fill in the form below. We can't wait to make a course, just for you!

item.title: Game Development Classes | Blue Ridge Boost
Gaming Fridays | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Ages 6–10 & 10+ • Fridays, 5:30–8:30 PM • Free pizza included

Blue Ridge Boost, 2171 Ivy Rd, Charlottesville

Reserve Your Spot
What's Included

Limited seats available each Friday. Choose a date below to register.

🎮 Level Up Your Friday!

Whether you're a Fortnite fan, Robloxian, Crafter, or just love gaming — this is your night to shine! Dive into thrilling multiplayer battles, explore immersive worlds, or take on challenges as a team with our fully-decked-out gaming setups. Plus, free pizza included!

item.title: Math Classes and Tutoring | Blue Ridge Boost
Open House | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Join Us for the Blue Ridge Boost Monthly Open House!

Join us on the first Sunday of every month to explore our engaging programs in Computer Coding, Robotics, Science, and Math for kids, teens, and adults.

📅 When: The 1st Sunday of every month
🕒 Time: 3:30 PM - 5:30 PM
📍 Where: 2171 Ivy Rd, Charlottesville, VA 22903

At our Open House, you’ll have the opportunity to:

  • Learn about our classes and camps for grades 1-12
  • Explore our gaming clubs like Minecraft, Roblox, and Fortnite
  • Get details on our certifications in coding and robotics for teens and adults
  • Meet our expert instructors and see how we inspire and empower students through robotics competitions and innovative enrichment programs!

🎉 RSVP Today: “buy” one of the products below, call (434) 260-0636, or email nora@blueridgeboost.com.

item.title: Payment Error | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Dear Blue Ridge Boost Customer,

We regret to inform you that we encountered an error while processing your order. We understand this is inconvenient, and we appreciate your patience.

Our team is working diligently to resolve the issue. We will update you on the status of your order as soon as possible.

If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact our customer support team at nora@blueridgeboost.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: Payment Policy | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Accepted Payment Methods

Blue Ridge Boost LLC accepts the following payment methods:

  1. Credit Cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover)
  2. Debit Cards
  3. Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT)
  4. Checks (personal or cashier’s)

Payment Due Date

All payments for classes are due upon registration. Your child’s spot in the class will not be reserved until payment is received in full. Subscriptions will be charged on the current date. Future payments will be drawn at the beginning of each month, starting with the second class.

item.title: Privacy Policy | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Blue Ridge Boost LLC (“Blue Ridge Boost,” “we,” “us,” or “our”) is committed to protecting the privacy of the children enrolled in our classes and their parents/guardians. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and disclose personal information through the use of Ring video cameras in our classrooms. By enrolling your child in our classes, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

Information Collection

To ensure the safety and security of the children in our care, we use Ring video cameras to monitor and record activity in our classrooms during class sessions. The video footage may capture the name, likeness, image, voice, and actions of children, staff, and visitors present in the classroom.

item.title: Quest for Excellence Camps | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
All camps are held at Blue Ridge Boost, 2171 Ivy Rd, Charlottesville.

To accommodate busy summer schedules, we offer two convenient options:
Option 1: Drop off at 10:30 AM and pick up at 3:30 PM
Option 2: Drop off at 12:30 PM and pick up at 5:30 PM
Before and after care available.

At Blue Ridge Boost, all instructors are fully certified through the Carnegie Mellon Robotics Academy, ensuring top-tier robotics education for all participants. Plus, as part of your camp experience, taking the certification exam is included in the camp cost—providing a valuable opportunity to earn an industry-recognized credential while having fun learning robotics and coding!

item.title: Refund Policy | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
General Policy: No Refunds

We maintain a strict no-refund policy for all sales. This policy applies to, but is not limited to, the following situations:

  1. Customer-initiated enrollment cancellations
  2. Missed events due to student absence
  3. Program or instructor dissatisfaction
  4. Dismissal resulting from conduct violations

While we do not offer refunds, we value your feedback. We are committed to continuously improving our programs to meet your expectations. If you have concerns or suggestions, please don’t hesitate to share them with us.

item.title: Scholarships | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description: At Blue Ridge Boost, we are committed to making our classes affordable and encouraging the participation of underrepresented groups in the field of computer science. While we strive to provide a high-quality educational experience at the lowest price, we are aware that our classes and camps are too expensive for some of the children interested in computing. For that reason, we created three scholarship funds in remembrance of dear friends, three siblings that, unconditionally, loved each other and positively impacted everyone they came in contact with.

item.title: Spring Break Camps | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Spring Break Camps

A week of hands-on STEM fun during spring break for ages 6–13. Half-day (8:30 AM–1:00 PM) and full-day (8:30 AM–5:00 PM) options — all materials included.

Topics

Robotics — build and program robots
Coding & Game Design — Minecraft Education

How It Works

Learning sessions: Topic-related activities
Screen-free activity: Try a robotics, science, or strategic games topic
Exploration sessions: Try a different topic or gaming (with parent approval)
Breaks: Screen-free snack and lunch — board games encouraged

item.title: Terms and Conditions | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
1. Enrollment By enrolling your child in classes provided by Blue Ridge Boost LLC (“the Company”), you agree to these terms and conditions. The Company reserves the right to refuse service to anyone for any reason at any time.
  2. Age Requirements Children must be at least six years old to participate in drop-off classes.
  3. Day-Care License Program Exemption Blue Ridge Boost LLC offers a program of instructional experience in a single focus area, including robotics, computer coding, math, and chess. As such, we are exempt from day care state licensure requirements, provided that children under the age of six do not attend at all and no child is allowed to attend for more than 25 days in any three-month period commencing with enrollment. This exemption does not apply if children merely change their enrollment to a different focus area at our site and their total attendance exceeds 25 days in a three-month period.
  4. Attendance Limits Each child may attend a maximum of 25 days of classes within any three-month period, commencing with their enrollment date. This limit is in place to ensure that all children have equal access to our services and to maintain our exemption from licensure under state law.
  5. Payment and Subscriptions All classes must be paid for in advance. Payment is due upon registration. The Company accepts payment by credit card, debit card, or electronic funds transfer. Returned checks will incur a $25 fee. Subscriptions can be cancelled at any time; however, no refund will be issued for the remaining portion of the current payment period.
  6. Refunds and Cancellations All sales are final. The Company reserves the right to cancel a class for any reason. If the Company cancels a class, you will receive a full refund.
  7. Attendance Students are expected to attend all classes for which they are enrolled. No refunds or make-up classes will be offered for missed classes. If your child is unable to attend a class, please notify the Company as soon as possible.
  8. Conduct Students are expected to behave respectfully towards instructors, staff, and other students. The Company reserves the right to dismiss any student whose behavior is disruptive or inappropriate. No refund will be issued in such cases.
  9. Liability Waiver By enrolling your child, you agree to release, waive, discharge, and hold harmless Blue Ridge Boost LLC, its instructors, staff, and representatives from any and all liability, claims, demands, actions, and causes of action related to any loss, damage, or injury that may be sustained by your child while participating in classes.
  10. Media Release The Company reserves the right to use, reproduce, and/or publish photographs and/or video that may pertain to your child, including their image, likeness and/or voice without compensation. By enrolling your child, you understand and agree that all material shall become the sole property of Blue Ridge Boost LLC.
  11. Intellectual Property All course materials, including but not limited to handouts, presentations, and curricula, are the intellectual property of Blue Ridge Boost LLC and may not be reproduced or distributed without written consent from the Company.
  12. Amendments Blue Ridge Boost LLC reserves the right to amend these terms and conditions at any time. The most current version will supersede all previous versions. By enrolling your child in classes provided by Blue Ridge Boost LLC, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not enroll your child. If you have any questions, please contact us before enrolling.

item.title: Tutoring
item.description:
STEM Tutoring

Our competitive rates are tailored to your child’s educational needs. Pricing varies by subject complexity and tutor expertise. We provide personalized attention and targeted instruction to ensure optimal learning outcomes.

Elementary School

From $75 / hour

Middle & High School

From $95 / hour

AP & College

From $125 / hour
Book an appointment with Nora
Advanced Math and Computer Science Book an appointment - any tutor
Math, Physics, Computer Science Questions?
Use the form below.

About Our Sessions

Tutoring sessions are available both virtually and in person at the Blue Ridge Boost office, located at 2171 Ivy Road, Charlottesville. Our team of experienced teachers and qualified University of Virginia students is dedicated to helping your child excel in a variety of subjects, including mathematics, physics, chemistry, reading, and writing. We focus on nurturing problem-solving abilities, critical thinking skills, and fostering a deep understanding of core concepts, rather than just memorizing facts or formulas.

item.title: Vision and History | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
History of Blue Ridge Boost

During the COVID-19 pandemic, I spent a significant amount of time teaching and helping my children learn, and I discovered that I greatly enjoy teaching young students. This newfound passion led me to quit my Ph.D. program in Computer Science to pursue a degree in teaching at the University of Virginia, and I subsequently launched Blue Ridge Boost.

During the lockdown, Maxwell and Dorina enrolled in various challenging and exciting classes offered by the Center for Talented Youth at Johns Hopkins and The Art of Problem Solving. Despite the quality of the instructors, the lack of face-to-face interaction was a significant drawback.

item.title: Winter Break Camps | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
All camps are held at Blue Ridge Boost, 2171 Ivy Rd, Charlottesville.

Half-day students should bring a snack. Full-day students should bring two snacks and lunch.

Drop off starts at 8:30. Pick up ends at 1:00 for half-day and 5:00 for full day.

Ages 6 to 13. Please note that Blue Ridge Boost is a single focus instructional program, not a day care program. As such, students must be at least six years old for camps.

item.title: WRO Regional Open Qualifier 2026 | Blue Ridge Boost
item.description:
Blue Ridge Boost is an official host of a World Robot Olympiad-USEL Regional Open Qualifier for the 2026 season. Teams compete right here in Charlottesville, Virginia, for a chance to represent the USA at international Open Championships.

Register Your Team →

Qualify for International Open Championships 2026

🌎 Americas Open Championship 2026

  • Categories: All WRO competition categories
  • Age groups: All age groups
  • Spots: 1 per age group / category
Top-placing teams qualify for the Americas Open Championship in Ontario, California on September 25-26, 2026.

🌍 Non-Americas Open Championships 2026

  • Regions: Europe, Asia, Middle East and North Africa
  • Categories: All categories and age groups.
  • Spots: Minimum 1.
Spots are awarded to top placement teams in their respective categories.

Event Details

Event: WRO-USEL Regional Open Qualifier
Season: 2026 WRO USA
Location: Grounds of the University of Virginia, Charlottesville, VA
Dates: September 5-6, 2026
Organized by: Blue Ridge Boost
Sanctioned by: USEL Youth Robotics, WRO National Organizer in USA

Event Schedule

📅 Competition Dates: September 5-6, 2026

Optional early check-in available Friday, September 4, 2026
